analysis_summary: The game implements overwatch mechanics through a tile-based effect system. The ApplySkillTileEffectHandler is a TileEffectHandler that triggers skill usage when entities interact with tiles. Combined with SpawnTileEffectHandler and CounterAttackHandler, these form the overwatch/reaction shot system.

primary_handlers.name: ApplySkillTileEffectHandler
primary_handlers.purpose: Core overwatch tile effect - applies skills when entities enter/leave/move through tiles

primary_handlers.name: SpawnTileEffectHandler
primary_handlers.purpose: Deploys tile effects (including overwatch zones) when skills are used

primary_handlers.name: CounterAttackHandler
primary_handlers.purpose: Reaction shot when targeted by enemy attacks

fields_analyzed.name: TriggerFlags
fields_analyzed.description: Controls when the tile effect triggers. Each bit enables a different trigger condition.

values.0x01: TriggerOnAdded - Trigger immediately when effect is placed
values.0x02: TriggerOnTurnStart - Trigger at start of entity's turn
values.0x04: TriggerOnTurnEnd - Trigger at end of entity's turn
values.0x08: TriggerOnRoundStart - Trigger at start of each round
values.0x20: TriggerOnEnter - Trigger when entity enters tile (OVERWATCH PRIMARY)
values.0x40: TriggerOnLeave - Trigger when entity leaves tile
values.0x80: TriggerOnMovementFinished - Trigger when movement action completes

fields_analyzed.name: SkillTemplate
fields_analyzed.description: Reference to skill template that gets instantiated and used when effect triggers. For overwatch, this is typically an attack skill.

fields_analyzed.name: SoundID
fields_analyzed.description: Sound effect to play when the tile effect triggers

fields_analyzed.name: RemoveOnTrigger
fields_analyzed.description: If true, remove this effect after it triggers once. Enables one-shot overwatch behavior.

fields_analyzed.name: Condition
fields_analyzed.description: Optional condition interface to validate targets. Can filter by faction, visibility, etc.

fields_analyzed.name: OwningTile
fields_analyzed.description: Reference to the tile this effect is attached to

fields_analyzed.name: Template
fields_analyzed.description: Configuration template containing all effect parameters

fields_analyzed.name: SkillInstance
fields_analyzed.description: Instantiated skill object created from SkillTemplate

fields_analyzed.name: Delay
fields_analyzed.description: Frames to delay before effect triggers (visual timing)

spawn_tile_effect_fields.name: EffectToSpawn
spawn_tile_effect_fields.description: Template for the tile effect to spawn

spawn_tile_effect_fields.name: ChanceAtCenter
spawn_tile_effect_fields.description: Base % chance (0-100) at center tile for effect application

spawn_tile_effect_fields.name: ChancePerTileFromCenter
spawn_tile_effect_fields.description: % chance modifier per tile distance from center

spawn_tile_effect_fields.name: DelayWithDistance
spawn_tile_effect_fields.description: Visual delay multiplier based on distance for cascade effect

counter_attack_fields.name: CannotBeCountered
counter_attack_fields.description: Flag set to prevent counter-counter infinite loops

counter_attack_fields.name: MoraleState
counter_attack_fields.description: Actor morale state - value 2 means panicked and cannot counter

counter_attack_fields.name: IsActive
counter_attack_fields.description: Whether actor is active and can perform reactions

counter_attack_fields.name: IsAttack
counter_attack_fields.description: Flag on attacking skill indicating it's an attack (enables counter)

key_discoveries.title: Tile-Based Overwatch System
key_discoveries.description: Overwatch in this game is implemented through tile effects rather than unit states. When a unit enters 'overwatch mode', it spawns ApplySkillTileEffect instances on watched tiles.

key_discoveries.title: TriggerOnEnter Flag (0x20) is Primary Overwatch Trigger
key_discoveries.description: The main overwatch trigger is the TriggerOnEnter flag (0x20) in TriggerFlags. When an enemy enters a tile with this effect, it triggers the associated attack skill.

key_discoveries.title: Configurable Trigger Conditions
key_discoveries.description: The system supports multiple trigger conditions via bitmask flags, allowing flexible overwatch variants (on enter, on leave, on movement finish, per turn, per round).

key_discoveries.title: Condition-Based Filtering
key_discoveries.description: The ITacticalCondition interface at Template+0xD8 allows target filtering. This enables faction-based overwatch (only trigger on enemies) and other conditions.

key_discoveries.title: One-Shot Mechanics via RemoveOnTrigger
key_discoveries.description: Setting RemoveOnTrigger (Template+0xD0) to true creates one-shot overwatch that removes itself after firing once.

key_discoveries.title: Counter-Attack is Separate System
key_discoveries.description: The CounterAttackHandler handles reaction shots when targeted by enemy attacks. This is distinct from movement-based overwatch and triggers on OnBeingTargetedByAttack event.

key_discoveries.title: Probabilistic Tile Effect Spawning
key_discoveries.description: SpawnTileEffectHandler supports distance-based probability for spawning effects, enabling cone-shaped overwatch zones with decreasing effectiveness at range.

key_discoveries.title: Effect Refresh Instead of Stack
key_discoveries.description: If a tile already has an effect of the same type, it refreshes the existing effect rather than stacking multiple instances.

overwatch_setup: 1. Player activates overwatch skill on unit
2. Skill uses SpawnTileEffectHandler to deploy ApplySkillTileEffect on target tiles
3. Each tile receives effect with TriggerFlags=0x20 (TriggerOnEnter)
4. Effect stores reference to attack skill to use
overwatch_trigger: 1. Enemy unit moves into affected tile
2. Tile's OnEnter event fires, calling ApplySkillTileEffectHandler.OnEnter
4. If set, calls ApplySkill with entering entity as target
5. ApplySkill validates target via Condition, plays sound, executes skill
6. If RemoveOnTrigger is true, effect is removed from tile
counter_attack_flow: 1. Enemy attack targets unit with CounterAttack skill
3. CounterAttackHandler validates defender can act (not stunned, not panicked)
4. Handler finds usable attack skill in defender's weapon
5. Sets CannotBeCountered flag to prevent infinite loop
7. Uses attack skill against the attacker
